arts.ttl: Official | Oussama Targhalline joins Feyenoord from Le Havre
arts.sum: Oussama Targhalline (22) has become the latest player to leave struggling Ligue 1 side Le Havre AC. The midfielder has joined Eredivisie side Feyenoord. Targhalline joined the Dutch side following…

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Jonathan David in advanced talks over summer transfer after Tottenham and Man United made contact
arts.sum: He's about to make his final decision👀

Le Havre faces a tough test against Lille, especially with their captain, Arouna Sangante, suspended, weakening their defence. Lille, boosted by their 6-1 UCL win but reeling from a Coupe de France ...
